content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.77%, Pharma +2.61%, Metals +1.95%, IT +1.66% leading. India VIX cooling -4.87% to 18.75. Strong earnings season tailwind across PSU banks, HFCs, FMCG. Existing book is in the green and well-positioned; priority is locking in gains via SL trails rather than fresh adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Recovered intraday +2.20% to 79.61 from yesterday's 77.31 close. Strong Q4 results (PAT +34.89% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, NNPA 0.13%) intact. Position now only -2.5% vs entry. SL at 76.00 sits below S2 (76.95) — keep current SL; tightening to entry would risk noise stop on volatile PSU bank. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.5% — already trailed to 1035.47 (above entry 984). Current SL is fine; no modification needed actually. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Already at SL 1418 which is above entry 1412.94 — breakeven+ locked. CMP 1432.90, P&L only +1.1%. Not yet at +2% threshold to warrant further trail. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.8% (CMP 701.85 vs entry 681). Trail mandate triggered: lock in gains by raising SL from 685 to 690 (above entry, below 9:15 candle low 691). Q4 earnings Apr 29 is a binary event in 2 days — tighter SL appropriate. Stock near 52w high; if pre-earnings melt-up continues, target 725 stays. R:R from 701: ~12 up vs ~12 down = balanced; let runner run with tighter stop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near flat at -0.2%. FOMC Apr 29 binary catalyst in 2 days. SL 119 is reasonable (4.7% below CMP) — diversifier in case of risk-off. No trail action warranted given flat P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0%, recovered intraday +1.13%. Q4 earnings Apr 30 (3 days) is binary. SL 2260 (4.8% below CMP) appropriate given elevated event risk and premium valuation. Hold into print; no trail until confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0% with strong sector momentum (Energy +0.98%, NGEL capacity adds, summer demand). Tightening SL from 396 to 401 — still below today's intraday low 402.60 if probed but reduces risk on a name already at the upper Bollinger band. Approaching 52w high 407.25; allow room to break out toward target 425."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results being announced TODAY with high event risk (analyst call 6 PM IST). Stock down -2.12% pre-result jitters. Entering blind into binary earnings violates capital preservation. Wait for tomorrow's reaction."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDBI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Disinvestment narrative is binary and has whipsawed -45% then recovered. Q4 May 10. Volume surge +3.1x is interesting but past failed bid history makes risk asymmetric. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pharma is today's leader but I already have GRANULES exposure to the theme. Adding PHARMABEES on a +2.46% gap-up day is chasing strength after the move. Capital preservation > FOMO. Already 49% deployed."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovering intraday on Q4 strength. SL 76.00 below S2 protects without being too tight. Let position work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1035.47 (entry+5.2%) locks in solid gain. Target 1100 ~5% away. No change needed; trail further only on next breakout above 1060."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; FOMC Apr 29 binary. Hold through event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already locks in breakeven+. Q4 already reported (+27% PAT beat). Let trend continue toward 1480."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 690.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.8% gain + binary Apr 29 earnings warrants tighter trail to lock breakeven+9 buffer above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days; SL at 2260 (-4.8%) has room to absorb pre-earnings noise. Reassess post-print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 396 to 401 as stock approaches 52w high. Risk-budget compatible (1.5% SL distance vs ~5% position size = 0.075% portfolio risk)."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUBANK — revisit tomorrow post-earnings; if dividend + numbers strong and stock holds above 1040, consider entry. SUNPHARMA and INDUSINDBK — let post-earnings froth settle 1-2 days before chasing. SAIL/HINDZINC — metals breakout interesting but pharma + financials clusters already represented; one more cluster add max. TORNTPOWER — would create power cluster crowding (NTPC already held); skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 49% deployed with +0.48% session P&L and +0.63% experiment-to-date. Strategy: lock in gains via trails (NTPC, GRANULES) on names approaching 52w highs, hold through 3 binary earnings events this week (GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30, FOMC Apr 29). 5-day win rate is poor (1W/2L) so quality over quantity — no new entries today. Cluster exposure: Financials (PNBHOUSING+MAHABANK)=~14%, Pharma (GRANULES)=5%, Power (NTPC)=5%, FMCG (NESTLE+HUL)=~16%, Gold ETF=5%. Healthy diversification."
}
